name: Bread in Jars: Pumpkin Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place a baking sheet on the middle rack and remove the top rack from the oven.
3. Wash jars, lids, and rings in hot soapy water, then drain, dry, and cool them to room temperature.
4. Generously coat the inside of each jar with margarine.
5. To prepare the batter, combine raisins, flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cloves, cinnamon, and ginger in a mixing bowl.
6. In another mixing bowl, whisk together egg whites, sugar, softened margarine, and pumpkin.
7. Divide the batter among the 8 jars, filling them slightly less than half full.
8. Wipe the rims of the jars clean, then place them on the baking sheet (or they'll tip over) in the center of the oven.
9. Bake for 40 minutes.
10. Keep the lids in hot water until ready to use.
11. Once baked, remove the jars from the oven one at a time (they will be hot).
12. If needed, clean the rims with a moistened paper towel.
13. Place the lids and rings back on, then screw the tops tightly shut.
14. Set the jars on a wire rack to cool.
15. Once cooled, decorate with round pieces of cloth.
16. Unscrew the ring (the lid should be sealed by now) and place a few cotton balls on top of the lid to make it poofy.
17. Place a piece of cloth (about 3 inches larger than the lid) on top and screw the ring back on.
18. Decorate as desired (e.g., with pinking shears).
